name: ASCII Input SOM
description: SOM with ASCII character input (A, B). The original challenge: learn to distinguish letter shapes through distributed self-organization. Attempt only after Simple Figures converges.

config.description: ASCII characters rendered with press_start_2p font. The hardest input type: A and B share similar pixel distributions. Inspect neuron weights after ~500 steps to check for differentiation. Compare with and without tension_function.
